description: Case.caseType — the work type, orthogonal to status. standard is a normal instruction; audit is a second, independent CE inspection of a third-party engineer's original report on a repairable vehicle (ADR-0014), using an A. Case/PO marker and engineer_report evidence; audit_total_loss is the same work where the vehicle is a total loss, refined during review with an AP. marker (ADR-0021); diminution is a Diminution in Value engagement using a D. marker. The parser or staff review sets the value. Default: standard.
